name: mofa-github
description: GitHub integration via gh CLI — issues, PRs, CI, releases, and API queries

tools.name: github_cli
tools.description: Execute a gh CLI command to interact with GitHub. Supports issues, PRs, CI runs, releases, and raw API queries. The command should NOT include the 'gh' prefix — just the subcommand (e.g., 'pr list --repo owner/repo').

command.description: The gh subcommand to execute (without 'gh' prefix). Examples: 'pr list --repo owner/repo', 'issue create --title "Bug" --body "..."', 'api repos/owner/repo/pulls/55'

repo.description: Repository in owner/repo format. If provided, appended as --repo flag (unless command already contains --repo).
